description_long: This is a whole loaf of bread with a rounded top and a slightly flattened base, typical of sandwich or pan loaves. The crust is a deep brown color, smooth and unscored, with subtle creases and a matte finish. The sides and bottom of the loaf are lighter in color, suggesting a softer, less-baked area where the bread was in contact with the baking pan. There are no visible seeds, flour dusting, or decorative scoring on the crust. The loaf appears unsliced, with no visible cuts or separations. Its size and shape are consistent with a standard loaf of bread commonly found in bakeries or grocery stores.
description: A whole, unsliced loaf of bread with a smooth, brown crust and a lighter, soft base. The loaf is rectangular with rounded edges and no visible markings or seeds.
description_view_0: The end of the loaf is visible, showing a rounded, smooth brown crust with a slight crease near the base.
description_view_1: The broad side of the loaf is shown, highlighting the smooth, unscored brown top and a lighter, slightly uneven base.
description_view_2: The opposite end of the loaf is visible, similar to view 0, with a rounded crust and a subtle crease at the bottom.
description_view_3: The other broad side of the loaf is shown, mirroring view 1 with a smooth brown top and a lighter, soft base.
attribute_crust_pattern: The crust is smooth and unscored, with a uniform brown color and subtle creases near the base. There are no seeds, flour dusting, or decorative markings present.
